features.name: unpacked array of packed vectors in generate with cumulative assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of packed vectors (wire [W-1:0] arr [0:N-1]) assigned within a generate for loop using cumulative/sequential pattern where arr[i] depends on arr[i-1]

features.name: prefix accumulation pattern in generate loop
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that builds cumulative values where each iteration assigns arr[i] = arr[i] | arr[i-1], creating a prefix/or-reduction pattern

features.name: wire unpacked array declaration for simulation
features.description: Code should include wire declarations for unpacked arrays of packed vectors used in sequential processing
